name: Subagent-Driven Development
description: Orchestration methodology that dispatches independent fresh subagents for individual implementation tasks with mandatory code-review checkpoints between iterations, supporting sequential, parallel, and investigation execution modes

findings_summary.notes: Prompt-only skill (SKILL.md only, no scripts or hooks). Describes a multi-agent orchestration pattern using Task tool subagents with code review gates. No executable code or network calls present. Parent repo (NeoLabHQ/context-engineering-kit, TypeScript + Shell, 532 stars) is well-maintained and actively developed with organized plugin structure. Skill itself is markdown-only with no attack surface. Note: stars metadata was stale (recorded 433, actual 532). Skill enables dispatching Claude subagents for parallel/sequential work - users should be aware this pattern can spawn multiple agent tasks that incur token costs.

scan_summary: SKILL.md only - no scripts, hooks, or executables. Multi-agent orchestration pattern described in markdown. Low risk; token consumption implications for users of the skill.

status_cleared.reason: SM cleanup: only full_pipeline pass is real pass. Needs re-verification.
